summary: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

summary: Google DeepMind is transforming the mouse pointer into a context-aware AI partner. Move beyond the friction of traditional prompting with intuitive AI collaboration in Chrome and beyond.

summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.

summary: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.

summary: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.

summary: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.
